inputs.label: Design Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the embroidery design in centimeters.

inputs.label: Design Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the embroidery design in centimeters.

inputs.label: Stitch Density
inputs.businessContext: Average number of stitches per square centimeter for the design.

inputs.label: Thread Consumption Factor
inputs.businessContext: Meters of thread consumed per 1000 stitches, based on stitch type and thread weight.

inputs.label: Thread Cost per Meter
inputs.businessContext: Cost of thread per meter in your local currency.

inputs.label: Machine Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Average machine speed in stitches per minute, including downtime.

inputs.label: Labor Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly labor cost for the machine operator.
